content_text: Moon UserBot - Telegram Image 8t.me/s/moonuserbot?before=230 The **userbot** is now significantly more lightweight. * Pure Python Git: Replaced git CLI dependencies with dulwich. * Asynchronous Core: Refactored all HTTP requests to use aiohttp. Custom Modules * tts modules have been updated and fixed with better voice output support. * pdf2md has been fixed.
